arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Valencia 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Valencia in yet another crucial Liga game. Los Blancos are currently three points behind Barcelona in the table and while there’s a Clasico yet to be played, it seems safe to assume that Barcelona will win the tiebreaker even if Madrid manage to beat them in that game.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Valencia – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Spanish champions Real Madrid face a resurgent Valencia team in La Liga this afternoon. Carlo Ancelotti’s side can move level on points with Barcelona with a win, ahead of the latter’s fixture with Real Betis later in the day. arts.sum: Lunin spent the last few days recovering from a calf injury picked up during the Copa del Rey match, but he made the squad list and appears ready to feature in the starting lineup. Real Madrid face Valencia just a handful of days after playing 120 minutes in the return leg of the Copa del Rey Semifinals against Real Sociedad.
